(IMG) for a 
given year. Claims for imaging procedures are a subset of the claims, and a subset of procedures in the 
Part B carrier and DME data files. 

These imaging claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the first digit 
=I (except for “I1E,” or “I1F” — which are considered Part B drugs). The total Primary Payer Payments 
are calculated as the sum of the LINE_BENE_PRMRY_PYR_PD_AMT. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: IMG_PRMRY_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12
